nasb.text: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of knowledge; Fools despise wisdom and instruction.

esv.text: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of knowledge; fools despise wisdom and instruction.

cnv.text: 敬畏耶和華是知識的開端， 但愚妄人藐視智慧和教訓。

ccb.text: 知识始于敬畏耶和华， 愚人轻视智慧和教诲。

csbs.text: 敬畏耶和华是知识的开端， 愚妄人藐视智慧和管教。
